Tray.hint: The program is running on system tray

General._inputModeHintLabel:
Press the Han/Eng key to switch Input Mode. 
To change only the IME language, press it together with Ctrl (or Alt, Shift)

Hotkeys._hotkeysHintLabel: Click the key button and press any key to set hotkey

Tooltip._startTranslateToggle: Automatically sends a translation request once input is completed and enters the buffered state
Tooltip._autoSendMessageToggle: Automatically executes the input macro when translation is completed
Tooltip._inputMethodLabel:
Method of entering the original chat text
	Direct Input: Types directly into the chat window of a game or messenger. Text is composed by pressing keys.
	Overlay Input: Types into the program's input field. This is used for languages that do not support Direct Input.
Tooltip._outputMethodLabel:
Determines how the input macro behaves
	Clipboard Paste : Pastes clipboard contents directly
	Input Simulation : Types clipboard contents character by character (useful for games where pasting is blocked)
Tooltip._defaultInputModeLabel: Initial Korean/English input mode of the program
Tooltip._capturingToggleLabel: Starts or finishes input capturing (should match the chat hotkey in games)
